title: Timothy Callahan
compiled_truth: Timothy Callahan is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-27), Timothy Callahan sent 15 and received 52 emails, totalling 67 interactions. Top correspondents: [Michelle Cash](people/michelle-cash) (9), [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (6), [Marcus Nettelton](people/marcus-nettelton) (5), [Margaret Daffin](people/margaret-daffin) (5), [David Oxley](people/david-oxley) (4).
